newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Recent catalysts (the ~PLN200M PCO defense framework and the $8.4M InfraRed Associates acquisition) were Q1 2026 events. The -14.8% drop since June 9 appears to be a thin-volume pullback with no fundamental trigger.

sources.label: VIGO acquires InfraRed Associates (Notes From Poland)

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens (scientific_instruments bucket): IR-detector/photonics leverage is real but demand is driven by defense and industrial sensing, not AI inference scaling. No news since June 9; the sharp drop has no fundamental trigger. Hold at 19.
verdicts.bull: Vertically integrated MWIR/LWIR detector maker with growing defense backlog and a US foothold via InfraRed Associates.
verdicts.neutral: Niche photonics franchise; the AI test-time-scaling thesis link is weak versus its defense/industrial core.
verdicts.bear: $0.12B micro-cap, illiquid Warsaw listing, lumpy defense revenue; minimal direct AI-compute exposure.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Ramp of PCO defense framework and US detector expansion
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thin liquidity; defense-order timing; weak AI tie-in
